panels.description: Amount of memory used by the driver's JVM (on-heap and off-heap)
panels.title: Driver JVM Memory Usage

panels.description: Amount of execution memory currently used by the driver (on-heap and off-heap)
panels.title: Driver Execution Memory Usage

panels.description: Amount of storage memory currently used by the driver (on-heap and off-heap)
panels.title: Driver Storage Memory Usage

panels.description: Amount of pool memory (direct and mapped) currently used by the driver
panels.title: Driver Pool Memory Usage

panels.description: Memory usage for the driver's BlockManager (on-heap and off-heap, used and free)
panels.title: Driver BlockManager Memory Usage

panels.description: Disk space used by the driver's BlockManager
panels.title: Driver BlockManager Disk Usage

panels.description: Number of garbage collection operations performed by the driver (major and minor GC)
panels.title: Driver GC Operations Rate

panels.description: Total elapsed time during garbage collection operations performed by the driver
panels.title: Driver GC Time Rate

panels.description: Current CPU time taken by the Spark driver
panels.title: Driver JVM CPU Time Rate

panels.description: Number of source code compilation operations performed by the CodeGenerator
panels.title: CodeGenerator Compilation Count

panels.description: Average time spent during CodeGenerator source code compilation operations
panels.title: CodeGenerator Average Compilation Time

panels.description: Number of source code generation operations performed by the CodeGenerator
panels.title: CodeGenerator Source Code Operations

panels.description: Number of classes generated by the CodeGenerator
panels.title: CodeGenerator Generated Classes

panels.description: Average class size of the classes generated by the CodeGenerator
panels.title: CodeGenerator Average Class Size

panels.description: Number of methods and average size generated by the CodeGenerator
panels.title: CodeGenerator Methods

panels.description: Average size of the source code generated by a CodeGenerator code generation operation
panels.title: CodeGenerator Average Source Code Size

panels.description: Number of active jobs currently being processed by the DAGScheduler
panels.title: DAGScheduler Active Jobs

panels.description: Number of jobs that have been submitted to the DAGScheduler
panels.title: DAGScheduler Job Count

panels.description: Number of stages the DAGScheduler is either running or needs to run
panels.title: DAGScheduler Stage Count

panels.description: Number of failed stages run by the DAGScheduler
panels.title: DAGScheduler Failed Stages
